name: Ham'n Cheese Broccoli Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust according to package directions for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat oven to 350°F.
3. In a medium bowl, combine milk, eggs, dry mustard, and pepper; set aside.
4. Layer ham, cheese, broccoli, and onion in the pie crust.
5. Pour egg mixture over the ham, cheese, and broccoli.
6. Bake for 40 - 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
